title: Switch: decode shared Rig/Link fold timing (L3 LEAD)
goal: Switch 12.31 dB -> target >=13. LEAD task for the 12-slug 3D-fold Movements family. A correct fix to the shared Rig/Link timing lifts the whole family. Rule 10: re-open fct/minimized/Movements__Switch (repro committed) -> fix Rig/Link timing. MUST gate against all 12 family slugs so one doesn't regress another. DoD: >=3 of the family up, 0 regressions across all 12.
